title: The Woman in the Painting
writer: Ottavio Alessi, Leonardo Benvenuti, Piero De Bernardi
actors: Geronimo Meynier, Andrea Sciré, Vera Carmi
plot: Mario and the new kid Franco gradually become the best of friends, but their friendship is tested when one of them wins a competition.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award2 wins & 2 nominations total
